case_title: OMAR RAHMAOUI VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAHMAOUI, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY $5,422.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,527.00, DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES GP, INC., IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY MAILED TO RESPONDENT RAHMAOUI, OMAR
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART CO. WAS REPRESENTED BY FELICIA CHEN--PROPERTY MANAGER AND ANNA CHUN--ASSISTANT VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2015 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT. JUDGE PRO TEMP HENRY SHAIN, CLERK J. KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,314.54 FILED BY RAHMAOUI, OMAR AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICE GP, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday February 26, 2015 in Department 525:
Omar Rahaui, Respondent/Plaintiff appears in Propria Persona.
NO APPEARANCE by anyone for or from John Stewart Company and Universal Protective Services GP.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. The clerk administers the Oath to Omar Rahmaoui. Mr. Rahmaoui testifies on his behalf and responds to questions from Judge Shain.

Matter submitted at the conclusion of the hearing. No evidence presented in the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: Henry Shain; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Judgment Entered
